title: Loops and Error Handling
learningObjectives: Use loop and with_items to iterate over lists and dicts
Handle task failures with ignore_errors, block/rescue/always
Use failed_when and changed_when to customize task status
Implement retry logic with retries and delay

theory.content:
Loops

Ansible's loop keyword (preferred over legacy with_items) iterates a task over a list. The current item is available as item.

- name: Install multiple packages
  ansible.builtin.package:
    name: "{{ item }}"
    state: present
  loop:
    - nginx
    - git
    - curl

# Loop over dicts
- name: Create users
  ansible.builtin.user:
    name: "{{ item.name }}"
    groups: "{{ item.groups }}"
  loop:
    - { name: alice, groups: sudo }
    - { name: bob, groups: developers }

Loop Control

- name: Process items with label
  ansible.builtin.debug:
    msg: "Processing {{ item.name }}"
  loop: "{{ user_list }}"
  loop_control:
    label: "{{ item.name }}"  # cleaner output
    pause: 1                   # pause between iterations

Error Handling — ignore_errors

- name: Try to stop service (may not exist)
  ansible.builtin.service:
    name: old-service
    state: stopped
  ignore_errors: true

block / rescue / always

- name: Install and configure app
  block:
    - name: Install app
      ansible.builtin.package:
        name: myapp
        state: present
    - name: Configure app
      ansible.builtin.template:
        src: app.conf.j2
        dest: /etc/myapp/app.conf
  rescue:
    - name: Send failure alert
      ansible.builtin.debug:
        msg: "Installation failed!"
  always:
    - name: Clean up temp files
      ansible.builtin.file:
        path: /tmp/install
        state: absent

failed_when and changed_when

- name: Run script
  ansible.builtin.command: /opt/check.sh
  register: result
  failed_when: result.rc != 0 and 'not found' not in result.stderr
  changed_when: result.stdout != 'no changes'

Retries

- name: Wait for service to start
  ansible.builtin.uri:
    url: http://localhost:8080/health
  register: result
  until: result.status == 200
  retries: 10
  delay: 5
